items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-80 westbound between 7.4 miles east of Exit 133: PA 53 - PHILIPSBURG/KYLERTOWN and 6.8 miles east of Exit 133: PA 53 - PHILIPSBURG/KYLERTOWN. There is a lane restriction.
